reason: Project contract requires portable lakehouse patterns without Databricks product files or DATABRICKS_* dependencies.

idea: Auto-rewrite model or trainer code when training loss spikes
reason: Loss spikes may represent real physical anomalies; agents may halt or alert but must not mask the signal with automatic code repair.

idea: Use a 32-expert MoE by default on the 32 GB RTX 5090
reason: Prior lesson says 32 experts can OOM a 32 GB RTX 5090; prefer 8 experts plus gradient accumulation unless measured evidence justifies more.

idea: Add enterprise orchestration such as Kubernetes, heavy governance ledgers, or databases by default
reason: Current project strategy is local lakehouse plus RTX 5090; heavy platform overhead needs a concrete value-gate result.
Foundation models (TFT, DLinear, TimesFM, iTransformer, NBEATSx) consistently fail to beat best-naive (persistence/seasonal-naive) baselines on M1 data. Pruned from production pipeline.
Command Center UI and TensorBoard integrations removed. They are premature optimization / vanity engineering given the models currently fail to beat persistence. Focus is strictly on signal-to-noise.
